no: Diablo 2 Barbarian kit for Fighter class. Human, Dwarf, Half-elf, Half-orc. Warcries, combat masteries, two-handed sword single-hand conversion. Skill points system: one per level up to 3M XP. Part of Shohy's Diablo2 Kit Pack Series. Author confirms EET compatibility. Languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese.

passive.desc: +1 STR/CON, -2 INT/CHA at creation. d12 hit die.

activated.effects: Howl, Shout, Taunt, Battle Cry/Orders/Command, War Cry.
Bash, Double Swing, Leap, Stun, Concentrate, Frenzy, Whirlwind, Berserk.

new: Diablo 2-inspired berserker. War cries, combat masteries, and primal fury.

sum: Diablo 2-inspired Barbarian kit for the Fighter class. Human, Dwarf, Half-elf, Half-orc. Warcries, combat masteries, and two-handed sword single-hand option.

co.n: Extend the level restrictions of Howl and Taunt to LV32
co.tp2n: Extend the level restrictions of Howl and Taunt to LV32
co.no: Requires main kit component installed first

co.n: Allow the Barbarian(D2) to use a Two-handed Sword with one hand
co.tp2n: Allow the Barbarian(D2) to use a Two-handed Sword with one hand. Strongly advised to be installed after all MODs that bring new weapons
co.no: Requires main kit component. Install after all mods that add new weapons.
